title: EasyGo Badminton Set, with Net, 4 Racket, 4 Birdies, Portable Storage Box, for Backyards, Outdoor Games
features: Portable and Complete Set: Enjoy a fun game of badminton doubles with your friends or family anytime and anywhere with this portable equipment set that includes everything you need to play.
Handy Storage Box: The set comes with a handy storage box that doubles as a net base, two support poles, a badminton net, four (two pairs) of badminton rackets, and four birdies.
Easy to Carry and Store: All the components can be stored in the storage box that is easy to carry (total weight less than 5 pounds), so you can take it with you wherever you go.

Tool-free and Upgraded Net Assembly: The net assembly is tool-free and can be done in 3 steps within 30s, with an upgraded design of the support poles that features a hidden lock structure that makes it easy to extend and retract, more convenient and durable than previous types on the market.

High-Quality and Windproof Rackets & Base: The set also comes with two pairs of high-quality steel badminton rackets that are sturdy and durable, making the doubles game more enjoyable. The storage box also has a windproof and stable structure design that enhances the wind resistance.
